meta.title: A Better Process
meta.audience: Engineering teams who build internal presentations often
knowledge_base: Internal survey: deck edits average 40 minutes of style fixing
DeckLee schema v1 validator rejects all style payloads

beats.point: Hand-authored deck markup drifts from the underlying data
beats.support: Every theme change forces a manual re-style pass
beats.slide_hint: open on the pain, big and bold

beats.point: Author validated JSON and let the renderer own styling
beats.support: The schema rejects any style payload, so drift is impossible
beats.slide_hint: show the old way next to the new way

beats.point: The best styling is the styling you never write
